sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5582" key="a)mu/khtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμύκητος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of places, <sense id="n5582.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">where no herds low,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.150</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
